message:
test(golden): tighten existing Debug/Display assertions into exact-golden contracts

Third tranche in the golden-contract effort (after ac186be and 0afa781).
This pass converts existing loose `assert!(contains!(...))` / substring
checks into byte-identical equality assertions against explicit golden
constants. Every new constant is named `*_GOLDEN` and lives adjacent
to its test so the expected output is clearly diffable when formats
drift.

ffs-block — throttle_debug_format
- Pin the full `ThrottleInjector` Debug string including the nested
  ThrottleConfig (read_latency / write_latency / bandwidth_bps /
  stall_probability / stall_duration / respect_deadline),
  seed/events/log_len/rng_state, and the trailing `.. }` marker.

ffs-btree — search_result_debug_and_clone
- Golden for SearchResult::Found and SearchResult::Hole Debug output:
  pins the nested Ext4Extent fields (logical_block / raw_len /
  physical_start / offset_in_extent) and the Hole length variant.

ffs-core — pressure_monitor_debug_format
- Pin `PressureMonitor` Debug format end-to-end: the embedded
  ComputeBudget (with a `[CPU_COUNT]` placeholder for the host-specific
  value), the DegradationFsm (level / recovery_count / transitions /
  recovery_samples), the samples field, and the `.. }` suffix.

ffs-error — debug_formatting_includes_variant_name
- Two goldens: NoSpace variant renders as exactly `"NoSpace"`, and
  Corruption variant renders as
  `Corruption { block: 7, detail: "bad" }` — locks the Debug derive
  so future renames or field re-orders fail loudly.

ffs-ext4 — diag display goldens
- Replace `contains("missing required")` / `contains("FILETYPE")` with
  an exact-match against
  `"compat=, incompat=, ro_compat=; missing required: FILETYPE"`.

ffs-fuse — mount_handle_debug_format
- Full MountHandle Debug golden: mountpoint / active / shutdown /
  embedded MetricsSnapshot counters (requests_total, requests_ok,
  requests_err, bytes_read, requests_throttled, requests_shed) /
  unmount_timeout.

ffs-inode — inode_location_debug_format
- Pin `InodeLocation { block: BlockNumber(42), byte_offset: 256 }` as
  a single exact string.

ffs-mvcc
- demo.rs: snapshot_isolation_demo_is_deterministic now asserts the
  full six-line demo transcript (reader A → writer commits → reader A
  unchanged → reader B sees new version → PASS).
- rcu.rs: RcuCell and RcuMap Debug strings pinned to exact values so
  field order changes in the RCU-updater derive would fail the test.

ffs-ondisk — btrfs superblock_debug_and_clone
- Extensive golden locking the entire BtrfsSuperblock Debug output
  including the 32-byte csum array, 16-byte fsid array, magic number
  constant, generation/root/chunk_root counters, sector/node/stripe
  sizes, and the empty sys_chunk_array fields.

ffs-repair — self-healing demo E2E
- New `scrub_demo_output_line` helper replaces the variable
  `duration_ms=<N>` token with `<duration_ms>` before comparison so
  wall-clock variance doesn't break the golden. Asserts the full
  six-line demo transcript (image create → corruption → repair →
  verification → PASS).

ffs-types — txn_id_hash_and_debug
- Pin `TxnId(42)` Debug to exact literal instead of `contains("42")`
  so tuple-struct changes to the newtype fail the test.

ffs (top-level) — ext4_geometry_is_constructable
- Full Ext4Geometry Debug golden (block_size, inodes_count,
  inodes_per_group, first_ino, inode_size, groups_count,
  group_desc_size, csum_seed, is_64bit, has_metadata_csum) instead
  of `contains("4096")`.
